description: Utility functions for extracting persona skills, scoring user skills, and localizing salary ranges in a roles search context.

methods.name: extractFinalPersonaObject
methods.description: Parses and extracts a persona object from various envelope formats.

methods.name: extractPersonaProficiencies
methods.description: Extracts proficiency-bearing skills from persona data, prioritizing explicit lists, flat lists, and nested schemas.

methods.name: buildScoringUserSkills
methods.description: Builds a user skills array based on persona proficiencies or fallback skills.

methods.name: normalizeSalaryToIndiaLpaRange
methods.description: Converts salary range strings to standardized India LPA format.
